changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Add response_set_id to module_item_form_metadata for module-owned controlled response validation
changeSet.sql: UPDATE module_item_form_metadata SET response_set_id = ( SELECT ifm.response_set_id FROM item_form_metadata ifm WHERE ifm.item_form_metadata_id = module_item_form_metadata.item_form_metadata_id )

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Refresh item_form_metadata sync functions to include response_set_id
